message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 6 goals for the model.

Iteration 1 — setting up the participant structure (pools/lanes) first: an expanded Retailer pool with lanes for Portal, Warehouse, and Accounting, plus a collapsed Customer pool for communications only.
I'll now model the full Retailer process flow across the Portal, Warehouse, and Accounting lanes, including customer communications via message flows to the collapsed Customer pool.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 12 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 4 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

Applying critical fixes: (1) keep exactly one StartEvent for the expanded Retailer pool and remove confusing external triggers; (2) remove the invalid Customer→ReturnArrived message flow; (3) move refund activities to Accounting lane and connect Warehouse→Accounting via sequence flow.

I’ll resolve the critical start-event issue by ensuring PoolRetailer has exactly one StartEvent and that no other external trigger implies an additional start. Concretely: keep the existing Message StartEvent (customer registration), and keep the return-arrival/timeout wait strictly as an in-process event-based wait (no external message flow starts/creates parallel trigger paths). Also fix the misplaced Warehouse activities by moving them into LaneWarehouse and reconnecting via sequence flows.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 10 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 4 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…

I’ll fix the 4 critical BPMN issues: (1) remove the outgoing sequence flow from the EndEvent by turning it into an IntermediateThrowEvent(Message) and adding a proper end; (2–3) make the return-arrival wait a valid event-based option by giving CatchReturnArrived a MessageEventDefinition; (4) move TaskForwardApproval into the Warehouse lane.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 4 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

Applying critical fixes: (1) remodel 'Label sent' so it is not an EndEvent with outgoing flows; (2) remove the invalid EndEvent→EndEvent sequence flow; (3–4) make 'Return arrived' a valid event-based catch by adding a MessageEventDefinition.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 1 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
